summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. The job is not a dedupe cluster, has no canonical, and allows no merge/fix/raise_pr actions. The hydrated preflight artifact reports all listed PRs open and no security-sensitive items, so each PR is classified independently with no mutating close recommendation.
